payload.answer: I’m not confident which Sam this note refers to. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Ask the user to clarify which Sam the note is about before saving anything.
Keep the note unsaved until the correct Sam can be identified.
If this is about a new Sam, create a separate candidate memory for that person only after user confirmation.
If this is an additional fact about an existing Sam, add it separately only after user confirmation.
